summary: Tested modernized Excel Center (frontend + backend). Backend: 11/11 pytest cases pass — /api/excel/templates returns 14 templates with key/title/description/category/icon; all 9 required download keys produce valid openpyxl-loadable .xlsx with main sheet + 'How to use' sheet; ap_aging with company_id works. Frontend: /excel renders modern toolbar (14 templates count, search box, company selector), 5 category sections, 14 template cards. Search 'aging' correctly filters to 2 cards in 1 category. Download works without company (profit_loss, 7147 bytes, PK magic) and with company (ap_aging with Ticino Design Studio, 7683 bytes). i18n regression works: DE ('Excel Import- / Export-Center') and FR ('Centre d'import / export Excel') titles+subtitles translated, sidebar translated, downloads still succeed in DE (vat_summary 7330 bytes, profit_loss 7147 bytes).

issues: Hardcoded English strings not routed through i18n on the Excel Center page — even after switching to DE/FR/IT the following remain English: '14 templates' subtext ('Styled · frozen panes · filters · instructions'), search placeholder 'Search templates…', category section headers (Financial Statements, Ledgers & Accounts, Payables & Receivables, VAT & Bank, Operations), the helper line 'Select a company to auto-fill data-backed templates (AP/AR, VAT, Bank, P&L…).', and the toast strings 'Generating …' / '… downloaded' / 'Export failed'. Title/subtitle and Download button label are translated correctly. Recommend moving these strings into /app/frontend/src/i18n/translations.js under pages.excel.* and common.*.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Translate remaining hardcoded English strings in ExcelCenter.jsx (category headers, search placeholder, toolbar meta, helper text, toast messages) — currently only title/subtitle and 'Download .xlsx' button label go through i18n.
critical_code_review_comments: ExcelCenter.jsx: search placeholder, category names, toolbar meta text, and toast strings are hardcoded — inconsistent with the rest of the i18n refactor.

excel_export.py: TEMPLATES dict is large (206 lines) but focused and readable — no action needed. Template titles/descriptions are English only (server-side); acceptable since these are also stored server-side.

success_rate.frontend: 100% for functional flows; minor i18n gaps

test_credentials: admin@accountantos.ch / Admin123! (works, JWT via httpOnly cookie + token in body)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Excel Center fully verified. Backend excel_export.py generates valid xlsx (openpyxl-loadable, 2 sheets: main + 'How to use') for all 14 keys. UI has data-testid: excel-search, excel-category, excel-template-card, download-<key>, language-switcher. Company selector opens as dropdown; use role=option to pick a company. Only minor gap: several hardcoded English strings on /excel not run through i18n.
